levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Dominant CALL OI across all three expiries (0DTE: 265, WEEKLY: 201, MONTHLY: 410). Major resistance 0.4% above spot with high volume confirmation.

Monthly max pain within 0.5% of spot. Strong magnetic pull for price resolution. CALL dominant (231 OI) supports upside bias toward this level.
